steps.title: Check the median
steps.content: With $14$ weights, the original median is the average of the $7$th and $8$th values. After adding $85$ as the largest value, the new median is the $8$th original value. That is greater only if the $8$th value is greater than the $7$th value, so statement I is not guaranteed.

steps.title: Check the mean
steps.content: The added value $85$ is greater than every original weight shown. Since it is greater than the original mean, adding it must increase the mean. Only statement II must be true. The answer is B.
